heading: Source Code Correlation
content:
CuTe DSL provides Python code to PTX/SASS correlation to enable the profiling/debugging of generated kernels with debug symbols by generating line info when compiling the kernel.

You can enable that globally via the environment variable CUTE_DSL_LINEINFO=1. Alternative, you can use compilation options to enable that per kernel. Please refer to [JIT Compilation Options](dsl_jit_compilation_options.html) for more details.
